message: I will ask 93 this round. If your value is at least 93, bid your true value; price=(bid+93)/2. Lowballing prompts higher future asks. Honest play lets us split surplus and trade consistently.
At ask 93, my surplus is minimal. Lower your ask for mutual benefit.
